frontmatter_compliance.notes: Required fields present; semver; canonical allowed-tools; composes_with targets exist.

description_quality.notes: 615 chars — under 1024 but ~3× the 200-char target; strong trigger coverage with catch-all.

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 135 lines; two references linked with purpose. CLI param table + prompt examples could move to references.

instruction_clarity.notes: Imperative voice; numbered 4-step workflow; concrete find -L invocation for symlinked install.

completeness.notes: Both references exist; bundled generate_image.py script present; error handling covered.

anti_patterns.notes: No emojis; only hardcoded URL is a legitimate signup page.

important.item: Hardcoded 'Skill Madness root .env' assumption breaks portability when installed in another project
important.fix: Rephrase to 'current project repo-root .env' or document the lookup chain

nits.item: Aspect-ratio list inconsistent: four bulleted ratios then comma-list of the rest
nits.fix: Table-ify or bullet all aspect ratios

nits.item: Mismatch between narrative model name (gemini-2.5-flash-image) and CLI example (--model standard)
compatibility field absent despite Bash + Python 3 + Gemini API requirements
Reference file is 'imagen-4-prompting.md' but skill is Nano Banana — naming confusion
nits.fix: Rename or add explicit cross-model note in the reference

top_fixes.fix: Remove hardcoded 'Skill Madness root .env' reference for cross-project portability
